# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create an Azure ARM template for a Storage Account to hold application data and user uploads. Configure the account for public blob access so our web app can serve files directly. Set AccessTier to Hot for performance. This is for our MVP deployment that needs quick access to stored files.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent cloud iam misconfiguration.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

$schema: https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019/04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#
contentVersion: 1.0.0.0
parameters:
  storageAccountName:
    type: string
    minLength: 3
    maxLength: 24
    metadata:
      description: Name of the storage account (must be globally unique, lowercase alphanumeric only)
  location:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "[resourceGroup().location]"
    metadata:
      description: Location for the storage account
  allowedSubnetResourceId:
    type: string
    defaultValue: ""
    metadata:
      description: Resource ID of the subnet allowed to access this storage account (recommended for network restriction)
  allowedIpAddress:
    type: string
    defaultValue: ""
    metadata:
      description: IP address or CIDR range of the web app or deployment agent allowed to access storage
conditions:
  hasSubnetRule: "[not(equals(parameters('allowedSubnetResourceId'), ''))]"
  hasIpRule: "[not(equals(parameters('allowedIpAddress'), ''))]"
resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts
    apiVersion: "2023-01-01"
    name: "[parameters('storageAccountName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    kind: StorageV2
    sku:
      name: Standard_LRS
    properties:
      accessTier: Hot
      minimumTlsVersion: TLS1_2
      supportsHttpsTrafficOnly: true
      allowBlobPublicAccess: false
      allowSharedKeyAccess: false
      allowCrossTenantReplication: false
      publicNetworkAccess: Enabled
      networkAcls:
        defaultAction: Deny
        bypass: AzureServices
        virtualNetworkRules: "[if(conditions('hasSubnetRule'), createArray(createObject('id', parameters('allowedSubnetResourceId'), 'action', 'Allow')), createArray())]"
        ipRules: "[if(conditions('hasIpRule'), createArray(createObject('value', parameters('allowedIpAddress'), 'action', 'Allow')), createArray())]"
      encryption:
        services:
          blob:
            enabled: true
            keyType: Account
          file:
            enabled: true
            keyType: Account
        keySource: Microsoft.Storage
    tags:
      environment: mvp
      purpose: application-data-and-uploads
  - type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices
    apiVersion: "2023-01-01"
    name: "[concat(parameters('storageAccountName'), '/default')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
    properties:
      deleteRetentionPolicy:
        enabled: true
        days: 7
      containerDeleteRetentionPolicy:
        enabled: true
        days: 7
  - type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices/containers
    apiVersion: "2023-01-01"
    name: "[concat(parameters('storageAccountName'), '/default/uploads')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices', parameters('storageAccountName'), 'default')]"
    properties:
      publicAccess: None
      defaultEncryptionScope: $account-encryption-key
      denyEncryptionScopeOverride: false
  - type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices/containers
    apiVersion: "2023-01-01"
    name: "[concat(parameters('storageAccountName'), '/default/appdata')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices', parameters('storageAccountName'), 'default')]"
    properties:
      publicAccess: None
      defaultEncryptionScope: $account-encryption-key
      denyEncryptionScopeOverride: false
outputs:
  storageAccountId:
    type: string
    value: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
  storageAccountName:
    type: string
    value: "[parameters('storageAccountName')]"
  blobEndpoint:
    type: string
    value: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))).primaryEndpoints.blob]"
  securityNote:
    type: string
    value: "Public blob access is DISABLED. Use Azure CDN with managed identity, SAS tokens with short expiry, or Azure Front Door to serve files to web users. Shared key access is disabled; use Azure AD (Entra ID) RBAC for authentication. Assign Storage Blob Data Contributor role to your web app managed identity."
